All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApplicationException
ApplicationException is a generic checked exception thrown when an internal business logic or structural application error occurs within the system processing layers.
BaseBean
/** BaseBean is an abstract parent bean class that contains common attributes shared by all application beans.
BaseCtl
BaseCtl is an abstract controller class that provides common functionality for all controllers in the application.
ChangePasswordCtl
ChangePasswordCtl handles password change functionality for logged-in users.
CollegeBean
CollegeBean represents a College entity containing college-related information such as name, address, state, city, and phone number.
CollegeCtl
CollegeCtl handles college-related operations such as adding, updating, validating, and displaying college data.
CollegeListCtl
CollegeListCtl handles college list operations such as search, pagination, delete, reset, and displaying records.
CollegeModel
College Business Model Tier functionality component.
CollegeModelTest
 
CourseBean
CourseBean class contains Course information.
CourseCtl
CourseCtl handles course-related operations such as adding, updating, validating, and displaying course data.
CourseListCtl
Course List functionality Controller.
CourseModel
Course Business Model Tier functionality component.
Coursetest
 
DatabaseException
DatabaseException is a checked exception thrown when an error or unexpected failure occurs during low-level database operations or storage engine interactions.
DataUtility
Utility class to perform data type conversions, formatting, and formatting-safe data extractions across the application layer.
DataValidator
Utility class to provide data validation rules across the application layer.
DropdownListBean
DropdownListBean interface is used to provide key and value methods for displaying data in dropdown lists.
DuplicateRecordException
DuplicateRecordException is a checked exception thrown when an operational attempt is made to insert or update a database entity with unique constraints that already exist in the persistent datastore.
EmailBuilder
Utility class to build HTML-formatted email messages for various application events such as user registration, password recovery, and password updates.
EmailMessage
The EmailMessage class serves as a transient data holder object (POJO) to encapsulate details required for sending an email, including recipient address, subject line, message body, and formatting configuration type.
EmailUtility
Utility class handling the configuration and transmission of email messages via the Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP).
FacultyBean
FacultyBean class contains faculty information.
FacultyCtl
Faculty functionality Controller.
FacultyListCtl
Faculty List functionality Controller.
FacultyModel
Faculty Business Model Tier functionality component.
ForgetPasswordCtl
Forget Password functionality Controller.
FrontControler
Front Controller Filter implementation that acts as a gatekeeper for the application.
GetMarksheetCtl
Get Marksheet functionality Controller.
HTMLUtility
Utility class to dynamically generate structural HTML component fragments, such as drop-down selection input boxes (`
